experienceItems.title: Middle Frontend Developer | Shopify, Vue.js, Nuxt
experienceItems.description:
Frontend Developer focused on Shopify, Vue, Nuxt, JavaScript, Liquid, and ecommerce interfaces.

Working on frontend development, UI implementation, performance improvements, Shopify storefronts, reusable components, and integration with modern ecommerce workflows.

experienceItems.title: Headless Frontend Developer (Shopify / Nuxt 3 / Vue)
experienceItems.description:
🚀 Developing high-performance headless storefronts using Nuxt 3 and Shopify Storefront API

🧠 Creating CMS-driven sections via Shopify Metafields (navigation, footers, banners, content blocks)

🔧 Building modular architecture with reusable components and global UI elements

🛒 Prototyping a custom checkout flow with Telegram Bot integration, Nova Poshta delivery, online payments and confirmation modals

📰 Developing a full-featured blog system with tags, filters, likes, live search, and recommended posts

🔍 Improving SEO with SSR, dynamic meta tags, canonical URLs, and sitemap generation

📦 Adding JSON-LD structured data (Product, BlogPosting, Breadcrumb) for enhanced search visibility (Rich Snippets)

🐍 Writing Python scrapers for content migration (e.g., legacy ASPX blogs → Shopify)

🧰 Implementing Firebase + JSON-based content editing for lightweight and flexible content management

🌈 Organizing Shopify filters: mapping inconsistent color names, unifying filter values, adding SEO-friendly labels

🎨 Designing a clean, responsive UI with dark/light theme support and performance-focused styling

experienceItems.title: FE Shopify Plus Developer | E-commerce Platform Specialist
experienceItems.description:
🔸 Liquid Development: Development of custom templates, dynamic sections, and components based on Liquid.
🔸 Frontend Development: Use of modern frameworks (HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, TailwindCSS, React) to build a responsive and optimized interface.
🔸 Shopify Plus Features: Setting up Shopify Scripts for discount automation, customizing checkout, and integrating Shopify Flow for business processes.
🔸 API Integration: Work with Shopify REST API and GraphQL to integrate with CRM, ERP, and marketing platforms.
🔸 Performance Optimization: Improve page load speed with asynchronous content loading, image optimization, and code minimization.
🔸 Third-party Apps & Customization: Integrate and modify third-party applications through the API or create custom applications in Node.js.

experienceItems.title: Front End Engineer Shopify E-Commerce | Vue | Nuxt
experienceItems.description:
🔸 Developing the design and functionality of online stores in accordance with customer requirements.
🔸 Integration of the necessary modules and applications to ensure the full functionality of online stores.
🔸 Testing and eliminating errors in the code.
🔸 Support for online stores after launch.

experienceItems.title: Front End Engineer Vue Composition API
experienceItems.description: Code optimization, changing the logic to the Composition API, working with GraphQL.

experienceItems.title: Development of a company website
experienceItems.description: Development and implementation of interface components such as menus, carousels, order forms, product filters, etc.

educationItems.title: Front-end developer courses
educationItems.description: Thanks to this course, I will be ready to create interactive interfaces as well as build full-fledged websites, from layout to hosting.

educationItems.title: Course Front-end development
educationItems.description: I gained a deep understanding of basic technologies such as HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, which are the foundation of any web developer.

educationItems.title: Web developer
